message.content:
@startuml
autonumber
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam sequenceMessageFontName Courier

participant "Main" as Main
participant "creatFile" as creatFile
participant "createJava" as createJava
participant "createCSS" as createCSS

Main -> creatFile: 1 call function
creatFile -> createJava: 2 callfunction
creatFile -> createCSS: 3 callfunction
creatFile --> Main: 4 new file created
createCSS --> Main: 5 new file created
createJava --> Main: 6 new file created

@enduml
